global-lex-monovariant.last_note: Complete correct proof of both parts; termination via lex (N,P), value via g_p invariant, N=0 excluded non-circularly. Verified by simulation. APPROVE.
global-lex-monovariant.summary: Termination via global lex monovariant (N=#entries>1, P=product); value via per-prime exponent-gcd invariant g_p.
